title: alchemilla podophylla
intro: Alchemilla podophylla, also known as the Buckthorn or Chinese Rhubarb, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and laxative effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla podophylla include relieving constipation, reducing swelling and pain, and supporting the digestive system. Alchemilla podophylla can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
